maintainer_preferences: Do not move helpers to new packages — keep refactors within-package
Title feature: one --title TEXT flag only (not per-command separate flags)
go.mod and go.sum are protected files — cannot be pushed by automation
.github/workflows/release.yml is a protected file (see issue #388) — may need manual PR apply
notes: Run 27894723931 (2026-06-20): Task 2 - commented on #333 noting PR #438 by maintainer resolves legend decoupling. Task 5 - found selectionMetrics was silently non-functional (classification.Register never called); created fix branch fix-classification-wiring-402 with RegisterSelectionMetrics pipeline stage; wired into all 5 viz commands; build/test/lint all pass; PR pending. Task 3 fallback - no bug/help-wanted issues. PR #437 is the ginkgolinter PR (was pending). Issue #402 still open - new PR (fix-classification-wiring-402) closes it. PR #438 by maintainer (legend/inks refactor) is open. Dependabot PRs #433-436 open but protected files prevent bundling.
